task: Fetch the Hacker News front page (https://news.ycombinator.com/), extract the top 15 stories (title, points, and domain)

name: fetch_hn_top_stories
purpose: Fetch the Hacker News front page (https://news.ycombinator.com/), parse the HTML, and return the top 15 stories as a list of dicts, each containing: title (str), points (int), and domain (str).

steps.step: Request a tool to fetch and parse the Hacker News front page, returning top 15 stories with title, points, and domain
Call the promoted tool to get the data
Return the final answer with the top 15 stories
Request a tool to fetch and parse the Hacker News front page, returning top 15 stories with title, points, and domain
Call the promoted tool to get the data
Return the final answer with the top 15 stories

text:
Here are the top 15 stories from the Hacker News front page:

| # | Title | Points | Domain |
|---|-------|--------|--------|
| 1 | The Zilog Z80 has turned 50 | 59 | goliath32.com |
| 2 | AWS: Inaccurate Estimated Billing Data – $1.7 billion | 889 | *(self post)* |
| 3 | First atmosphere found on Earth-like planet in habitable zone of distant star | 281 | www.bbc.com |
| 4 | Learning a few things about running SQLite | 85 | jvns.ca |
| 5 | Frame – Linux X server in Assembly | 110 | isene.org |
| 6 | Kimi K3, and what we can still learn from the pelican benchmark | 202 | simonwillison.net |
| 7 | The state of open source AI | 313 | stateofopensource.ai |
| 8 | Three ways people respond to a problem (other than solving it) | 152 | improvesomething.today |
| 9 | Frank Lloyd Wright's first home | 48 | www.architecturaldigest.com |
| 10 | Show HN: A zoomable timeline of 4M Wikipedia events | 20 | app.everything.diena.co |
| 11 | AI Meets Cryptography 2: What AI Found in OpenVM's ZkVM | 73 | blog.zksecurity.xyz |
| 12 | Show HN: Watch bots interact with an SSH honeypot in real time | 119 | honeypotlive.cc |
| 13 | A Road to Lisp: Which Lisp | 147 | scotto.me |
| 14 | More Bounce to the Ounce | 88 | mceglowski.substack.com |
| 15 | EEG shows brain can simultaneous encode two speech streams | 240 | journals.plos.org |

**Highlights:**
- 🏆 **Top story by points:** *AWS: Inaccurate Estimated Billing Data – $1.7 billion* with a whopping **889 points**
- 🌍 **Science buzz:** *First atmosphere found on Earth-like planet in habitable zone of distant star* (281 pts)
- 🤖 **AI & Open Source:** *The state of open source AI* (313 pts) and *Kimi K3* (202 pts)
